## CssExtract interface

The [CssExtract](./rspeedy.cssextract.md) controls the options of [CssExtractRspackPlugin](https://www.rspack.dev/plugins/rspack/css-extract-rspack-plugin)

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface CssExtract 
```
